General.Name: Lifezone Metals Limited
General.Description: Lifezone Metals Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the metals production and recycling business. The company's flagship project is the Kabanga Nickel Project located in north-west Tanzania. It is also involved in the intellectual property licensing business. The company is based in Douglas, Isle of Man.
General.Address: St George's Court, Douglas, Isle of Man, IM1 1EE
